comment: "The most interesting aspects of this course were learning how waste in healthcare affects efficiency and patient care, and seeing practical ways to create a productive operating theatre. I also found the focus on teamwork, communication, and resource management very engaging, as these directly impact staff performance and patient safety."

"For me, every aspect of it was interesting because it elaborated my learnings here in the operating room. I get to be able to explain why is this happening, what I should prevent, what risks I should assess, everything from it helps me and taught me how to give patient care effectively and safely."

"Thank you for a really great course which was easy to navigate. I appreciate all of it. It was all very relevant to the operating room/ surgical services setting. Thank you for all the hard work that went into putting together a very comprehensive, informative and research backed learning experience !"

"This course provided the opportunity to explore real-world applications of the theories learned. Practical examples and hands-on activities made the material more engaging and easier to understand. The course also effectively built upon foundational knowledge, with a clear progression from simpler to more complex concepts."
"I found that this course it provides up-to-date, evidence- based knowledge to help you develop your theoretical and practical understanding of nursing care in the operating theater environment."
"I would recommended this course to my colleagues because it’s very good and helps you know how to work in theater."
"Thank you so much for this E learning course. It opened my eyes to things I was not aware off."
